_README: Copy this file to assets/sprite-mapping.local.json (gitignored). Each entry slices frames from a source sheet you are AUTHORISED to use and repacks them into a single VERTICAL strip named <imageName>.png that the engine expects. The frame count MUST match the matching entry in src/animation/SpriteDefinitions.ts (the Sprite class advances down the Y axis and computes frame height as image.height / frameCount). 'source' is a URL or local path to the source sheet. See ASSETS.md.

_frames_formats.grid: { "grid": { "cols": N, "rows": M } } - frames are read left-to-right, top-to-bottom; optional "indices": [..] picks/orders a subset
_frames_formats.explicit: [ { "x":px, "y":px, "w":px, "h":px }, ... ] - one rect per output frame, in order
